title: Ecclinusa pumila
intro:
There is not enough information available about the plant Ecclinusa pumila, however, I can provide information on the plant Echinacea pumila. 

Echinacea pumila, also known as the small coneflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Echinacea pumila is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its potential health benefits such as stimulating the immune system, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the recovery from infections. The bioactive constituents of Echinacea pumila include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Echinacea pumila include teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to support immune function and prevent illnesses such as the common cold.
